description: A Class B artifact whose declared evidence does not reach the threshold required to either support or refute the claim MUST receive INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE status.

input.claim: this execution occurred with the declared observed result

observations.result: log truncated before exit code recorded

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 §3 Class B: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE is the correct status when declared evidence cannot affirm or refute the claim. The single declared source is truncated and its observation neither supports nor contradicts the claim. Exercises B1 (sources declared explicitly) and the requirement that evidence shape determines status.
